contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Hit List warm-up follow-ups (5 items): GAS hardening, promote guard, format audit, dedupe, cron verify
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/273
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/118
  
  Details:
  Worked through the 5 follow-ups from this morning's advisory format-bug investigation. Two PRs merged, two live sheet edits, one operational verdict.
  
  PRs MERGED:
  
  1) tokenomics#273 — fix(pipeline-metrics): coerce TIME-cast Date cells back to integer counts.
     Hardens sync_pipeline_metrics.gs::_touchCountPipeline_ against any future TIME-format leak on Hit List AU/AV. Apps Script getValues() returns JS Date objects for TIME-formatted cells and parseFloat(String(date)) silently yields NaN -> 0; the patched function detects v instanceof Date and recovers the underlying integer via (getTime() - sheetEpoch) / 86400000. This is defense-in-depth: the underlying TIME format on AU/AV was already cleared via batchUpdate this morning, but the GAS now survives a recurrence. Deploy needs clasp push on script id 11fA8NXSOwKyddXDZmmx3BRCDU1Y38GVidENCj0mujH0pT-AqIoOyaetj; daily 06:00 trigger picks up new code.
  
     Side note: the original task framing was 'patch generate_advisory_snapshot.py'. That script does not read AU/AV directly — it embeds metrics/weekly.md verbatim. The actual reader is the GAS, which is what landed.
  
  2) go_to_market#118 — fix(hit-list): refuse to promote rows with placeholder filler@godaddy.com.
     hit_list_promote_status.py 'email-to-warmup' command now skips rows whose Email is exactly 'filler@godaddy.com' (a placeholder hit_list_enrich_contact writes when website crawl finds no real address). Both candidate-collection (line 250) and post-lock live recheck (line 288) guarded. The FILLER_EMAIL constant is module-level so future scripts can import it. Existing 3 affected rows (Mossy Tonic 373, Cascadia Crystals 540, Avebury Mystikals 605) need separate operator action — either re-enrich or demote — not handled by this PR.
  
  LIVE SHEET EDITS (no PR — direct ops on 1eiqZr3LW-...):
  
  3) Audit of all Hit List integer columns formatted as TIME — found 1 stray.
     Audited row-2 numberFormat for all 50 Hit List columns. 13 columns had TIME format. 12 are legitimate (Monday/Tuesday/.../Sunday Open + Close). 1 was wrong: AT 'Google listing' (string-valued, contains 'Closed' / 'Temporarily closed' / empty) had numberFormat={type:TIME,pattern:'h:mm'}. Reformatted AT2:AT669 -> {type:TEXT,horizontalAlignment:LEFT}. Benign at storage layer (Sheets ignores number format on string cells), but the misapplication itself was an indicator of the same format-leak class as the AU/AV bug; cleaning it removes one more red herring from any future audit.
  
  4) Roots & Crowns Apothecary deduped.
     Confirmed two Hit List rows for the same physical store at 1812 NW 24th Ave Portland OR with email hello@rootsandcrowns.com:
       - row 176: store_key 'roots--crowns-apothecary__1812-nw-24th-ave-portland-or-97210-united-states__portland__or' (older normalization, 2 warm-up sends already lodged in Email Agent Follow Up under this key)
       - row 501: store_key 'roots-crowns-apothecary__1812-northwest-24th-avenue__portland__or' (newer normalization, no contact history)
     Action on row 501: Status 'AI: Warm up prospect' -> 'On Hold'. Status Updated By 'hit_list_dedupe', Status Updated Date current UTC. Sales Process Notes appended with timestamped remark explaining the duplicate, pointing at row 176 as canonical, and flagging operator option to delete entirely. Reversible (status flip, not row delete) so audit trail is preserved.
  
  5) Mountain Rose Herbs Mercantile Seattle (row 577) cron eligibility — verdict: working as designed.
     Replayed suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py's eligibility logic against the live data:
       - 2 Hit List rows currently in 'AI: Warm up prospect' share to_email='support@mountainroseherbs.com': row 441 (Eugene OR) and row 577 (Seattle WA).
       - Last warm-up sends to that email: 2026-04-24 + 2026-05-03 (both keyed to Eugene's store_key in Email Agent Follow Up).
       - by_email grouping is the script's de-dup primitive: pick_primary_store() chooses the LOWEST hit_list_row as primary -> Eugene (row 441) wins -> draft is created against Eugene's content, with the 'hit_list_row' suggestion field recording '441,577' (both rows referenced).
       - Cadence default --min-days-since-sent=7. Last send was May 3, today is May 10. Currently right at the edge; eligible from May 10-11 onward.
     Net: cron IS picking up row 577 in eligibility checks; Seattle is just not getting a dedicated draft because it shares a corporate email with Eugene. To give Seattle its own warm-up cycle, operator must either (a) find a Seattle-specific email address, or (b) wait until Eugene's row leaves the warm-up bucket (e.g., promoted on reply). This is anti-spam behavior, not a bug.
  
  POST-FIX SNAPSHOT — true 'AI: Warm up prospect' AU=0 cohort is now interpretable:
    - 3 placeholder-email rows (Mossy Tonic, Cascadia Crystals, Avebury Mystikals) — promoted in error before today's go_to_market#118 fix; need operator demotion or re-enrichment to leave the bucket.
    - 1 deduped to On Hold (Roots & Crowns row 501).
    - 1 shared-email recipient (Mountain Rose Herbs Seattle row 577) — not a bug.
  
  OPEN_FOLLOWUPS still worth filing (didn't ship today, low priority):
    - suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py should also refuse to draft against filler@godaddy.com (preview HTML proves drafts were being created).
    - Demote the existing 3 placeholder-email rows (373, 540, 605) back to AI: Enrich with contact so they re-enter the email-discovery queue.
    - Hit List AU/AV formula short-circuit ('IF AD<>"" then store_key_match else email_match'): better behavior would be to fall through email_match when store_key_match returns 0. Cosmetic bug — affects per-store accounting when HL Store Key has been re-normalized but FU rows still hold the older form.
    - Run clasp push for tokenomics#273 so the GAS hardening is actually deployed (that PR is merged but the GAS still runs the old code until clasp pushes the file).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------
